text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In Copano Rickey's search to find a fellow runner
to help her train, she follows her feng shui-guided
clue, which leads her to Kitasan Black.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out that the two of them used to play in a
small park together when they were little. With
Satono Diamond added to the mix, the three of
them form a friendly rivalry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Copano Rickey spots a student
dropping out of Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey can't stand to see any more racers
giving up when feng shui could help them. Fueled
by kindness and determination, she continues to
seek a way to grow stronger.
